generated_oml:
instance DS18S20Sensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (first sensor)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20Sensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (second sensor)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20Sensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (third sensor)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214x214x3 mm heatbed requiring 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan for air circulation with 0.02 m³/s airflow"
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for sensor and actuator interfacing"
]

instance MOSFETs : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MOSFET switches for high-current circuit control (4A heatbed and 12V/24V fan)"
]

instance Optocouplers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Optocoupler isolation components for GPIO signal protection"
]

instance CustomPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB housing MOSFETs and optocouplers for hardware control circuitry"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for thermal incubator system"
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 cubic meters air volume"
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3
]

instance SafetyViolation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety violation detected in thermal incubator system"
]

instance SuboptimalPerformance : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Suboptimal performance detected in thermal incubator system"
]

instance SimulationCompleted : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Temperature simulation completed successfully"
]

instance CalibrationCompleted : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Thermal model calibration completed successfully"
]

instance AdjustParametersManual : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual adjustment of physical twin parameters by human operator"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustParametersAutomatic : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of physical twin parameters by algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CalibrationOfThermalModels : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration of thermal models using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationCompleted
]

instance SimulationBasedTemperaturePrediction : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based temperature prediction for thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationCompleted
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringSystemSafetyAndOptimality : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system safety violations and suboptimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolation, SuboptimalPerformance
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for inter-component messaging"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationOfThermalModels, SimulationBasedTemperaturePrediction, RealTimeMonitoringSystemSafetyAndOptimality
]

instance PythonScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationOfThermalModels
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based simulation engine for thermal dynamics prediction"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationBasedTemperaturePrediction
]

instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based real-time monitoring system for safety and optimality"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringSystemSafetyAndOptimality
]

instance TemperatureReadings : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance ExperimentalTrajectories : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Experimental temperature trajectories for model validation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyEnabler
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Two-parameter thermal dynamic model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Four-parameter thermal dynamic model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3, RaspberryPi4ModelB, MOSFETs, Optocouplers, CustomPCB, PowerSupply, StyrofoamContainer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands from the DT controller (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) are transmitted via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes them through the PCB's MOSFETs and optocouplers."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation integrates PT components (sensors, actuators) with DT models and algorithms via RabbitMQ communication, where the DT processes sensor data and issues control commands to the PT."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates in the 'as operated' lifecycle phase, integrating models and data from the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity validated through uniform temperature experiments and residual error minimization; Model B demonstrated higher accuracy in predicting heatbed thermal inertia compared to Model A."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for inter-component communication, with DS18S20 sensors connected via 1-Wire bus protocol to the Raspberry Pi controller."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and controller software deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to ensure device safety during operation, though specific cybersecurity measures are not detailed in the document."
]
